title: Session 18 — Planning the Attack
bodyText:
# What happened
A knock at the door: **Mr. Spells himself** — lean, golden-brown skin, immaculate black-and-gold suit with a black-and-red robe. He wanted his belongings (the bag); the party talked cleverly, **named him chairman of F & B**, and closed the deal at a discount. He revealed he'd been **tracking them through the mark on the bag** — and removed it once the deal was done.

Also: Eira + Brolin made progress **copying Ms. Judy's ritual spell**; Cumb got an outfit matching Varen's vibe; the grand **Filbert photoshoot** (Ricky Fandango's enchanted quill) rallied the town — Brolin's **magic faltered again**, Eddy covered. The F & B board was "renegotiated": Eddy, Varen, Felson join; 25% profit share; Filbert's board pick — **Mr. Spells**. Soni voiced deep distrust of all of it, pushed for a communal rebuild, and linked **four more speaking stones** for party-wide comms.
